transcript: Well, I don't know what a mule bowel is.
I don't know what a mule bowel looks like.

I probably have five thousand magnets in this place, and I've been doing this for forty-five years. I retired four years ago, I'm a retired electrical engineer. And I have never heard a question similar to what you have just asked me.
Well, that sounds very simple if you know what a mule bowel is.
And you're going to put a magnet on the outside of the animal, near the bowel?
Are you gonna stuff it up his ass?
'[sampled]' Obey me and live, or disobey and die.
